title: becium obovatum var. galpinii
intro: Becium obovatum var. galpinii, also known as Galpin's becia or Galpin's tea bush, is a shrub or small tree that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Becium obovatum var. galpinii include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
